title: これにて仕舞、そして幕開け

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Inari One have come to a
close...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the festival is far from over. Life continues as
always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shimmering light and splendor of the
fireworks she shot into the sky will never be
forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like those fireworks, I have no doubt
that the beats of her story will resound in the
hearts of her fans whenever they recall them.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Pardon me! Are you there, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies! I've come to inform you of a very
important and moderately urgent matter!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Rejoice! This is a momentous occasion! You have
been offered a position by an American
Umamusume training association!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa, whoa. What's the director doin' comin' all
the way down here? Did somethin' important
happen?)

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! They recognized your accomplishments in
making Inari One Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
While I believe this is an extremely rare
opportunity, the decision is ultimately in your
hands!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, the callback period is very short! I
would appreciate a timely response!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time flies as I ponder over the sudden offer...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Boss! Hard at work as usual, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Boss! Hard at work as usual, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Um... I wanted to talk to ya about
somethin', but now that I'm here, it's slipped my
mind...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Argh, to heck with it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to eavesdrop! I was passin' by and
happened to overhear your conversation with the
director!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to eavesdrop! I was passin' by and
happened to overhear your conversation with the
director!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And... I wanted to talk to ya about it.
choice_data_list: So that's what this is about.
So that's what this is about.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Take that job in America.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's a rare opportunity, right? That's somethin' to
celebrate! What better way to spread your wings
and get a taste of the world!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And if ya do well out there, that means I
personally trained with a globally successful
trainer! Amazin', right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And if ya do well out there, that means I
personally trained with a globally successful
trainer! Amazin', right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The folks back home won't believe this. Chief
might just have a heart attack!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, I already knew you were one talented
trainer, but this is on a completely different—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, I already knew you were one talented
trainer, but this is on a completely different—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...It's not my place to stop ya.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You know... Chief saw me off when I came to
Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
He gave me the courage to move forward... so I
wanna do the same for you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That's... how I feel!
choice_data_list: Come on. Don't you know me better than that?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This situation is completely different from her
saying goodbye to her coach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One truly wanted to compete in the central
races. And Chief respected that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But my situation is different, because...
choice_data_list: I want to continue being your trainer, Inari.
I want to continue being your trainer, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to walk side-by-side with Inari One, as her
trainer. I want to take on more challenges, start
more fights, and put on more festivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's so much for the two of us to do. So many
things to try. Our road hasn't ended—far from it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, despite receiving this offer to go to America...
choice_data_list: I won't go if you're not going.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Resolute in my feelings, I tell her everything that's
on my mind. As her partner.
choice_data_list: Let's keep putting on more festivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Because you can't—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Put on a festival alone, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I couldn't help myself. It had to be said
with style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's start this thing over, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's start this thing over, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The biggest, rowdiest road is just ahead, waitin'
for us to see what lies beyond!
